title: Mandala's GUI - Dark mode for Traveler's Backpack
description:
This is an UNOFFICIAL version of 
"Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" for "Traveler's Backpack"
body:
# About:
A resourcepack with the _GUI style_ of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" by [CesarZorak](https://modrinth.com/user/CesarZorak) for the mod [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
# Versions:
* Compatible with 1.20.x - 1.21.x
